item.title: This is called brainwashing, in layman's terms.
item.dc:creator: GwensBackOnHerBS

item.title: I cannot express how amazing it is to be able to even try and be myself.
item.description: Transition is Great l'm like 9 months into transition and I'm over 40. I don't pass as a woman at all, but I don't really pass as a cis man anymore either. I'm firmly in the uncanny trans valley of gender. I don't look pretty. I think if I get my weight under control and get a nose job I might pass, but I might not ever pass... I think that's ok though. I'm afraid of what the government is going to try and do. I'd leave the country if I could, but I've got kids to look after and shared custody with an ex wife who will never leave the country. I've lost some family over this, but we were never close to begin with. My body is definitely different. My ass is fatter and the boobs are coming along nicely. It feels really good even if the overall effect isn't there yet. But it so amazing to be able to be myself. Traipsing around in dresses. It's so amazing to even \\\*try\\\* to be myself. I love being able to accept that I'm trans. I'm like really very typically trans with so many trand cliches... I can get scared about transitioning, especially as I start to boyfail (which is still very different than girl passing) but all I have to do is think for 10 seconds what it was like to be in the closet. It's sooo wonderful. Gosh I wish it was faster.
item.dc:creator: GwensBackOnHerBS

1

24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @troynoi made this awesome looking knife. Check out their posts for more that they've made!
27 Man Tax: Jamison Dullea
“Since when do you have to agree with people to defend them from injustice?” - Lillian Hellman So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Frank's Big Day
item.description:
Took frank to the park
He's getting a little fluffy for the backpack
He does like to poke his head out to see what's going on
Then we started taking down the old cat tree in anticipation of the new one
Frank was supervising
And very confused
The carnage. The horror.
Chessie not giving a fig tax. The new tree will be here Friday. There was a small snafu with the delivery, but Chewy is amazing as always in getting it rectified.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: Little Mid-April Dumpy Doo
item.description:
And they rolled through some dust on the floor, and now she keeps giving me dirty looks
Pineapple. The answer is Pineapple.
Reminders are for the WEAK.
I mean, I LIKE them, but I wouldn't go so far as to say I'm INTO them. I just think about getting one any time I see anything miniature. "Wow that would be cool to put a little train track around it."
"This will not soon be forgotten."
Eminem does it all the time
Roald Dahl liked big butts, and he cannot lie.
Show me your ways, Dark One, so that I may draw caricatured pictures of them
And if you sleep past 9am, you're LAZY.
Life imitating art imitating life
You never know 'bout some folk. You gotta be reaaaal careful.
I did, and his name was Older Brother
The Great Physician
If I'm wearing socks, I must also be wearing shoes.
Kids are dumb
She could've at least given me a light chuckle to humor me.
Reunions are usually pretty awkward.
Mostly screams.
It's the "figuring it out" part that's the problem. It's not WORRY, it's STRESS to make it perfect because of my OCD.
They don't think it be like it is, but it do.
Like, is it any specific TYPE of whale? Or maybe just any large sea creature in general?
FINALLY finished that thing I started six months ago.
Doesn't matter, had sex.
Any discussion with me carries a potential risk of unsolicited infodumping.
item.dc:creator: ddubya42

item.title: Cosplayers and Their Families Photo Series
item.description:
All photographs by Niccolò Rastrelli, most photos taken 2022-2023 https://niccolorastrelli.com/they-dont-look-like-me Instagram @ niccolorastrelliphotography Mariko and her parents, Kyoto, Japan - Princess Padmé Amidala, Star Wars
Alessia and her parents, Busto Arsizio, Italy - Mono from Little Nightmares 2
Rachele and her family, Tuscany, Italy - She-Ra, Princess of Power
Mizuki, her mother and family, Osaka, Japan - Mizuki plays Nezuko Kamadoone from the manga Demon Slayer and her mother plays Tanjiro Kamado, Nezuko's brother.
Nicky and family, Kenya, Africa - African warrior God of Iron
Pretaporco and his parents, Kanagawa, Japan - Piccolo from the manga Dragon Ball
Andrea and his parents, Cesena, Italy - Amphibian Man from the film The Shape of Water.
Simone and her family, Como, Italy - Simone is It and her sister plays Beverly.
Henry and his mother, Nairobi, Africa - Tomura Shigaraki from the manga My Hero Academia.
Monaka and her brother, Tokyo, Japan; woman in the photo is their mother who died 11 years ago - Monaka wears a Cyclops mask, part of the Tanganmen subculture
Christian and his parents, Senago, Italy - Hawks from My Hero Academia.
Matteo and his parents, Milan, Italy - Haganezuka, secondary character from the manga Demon Slayer.
Jess and her parents, Nairobi, Africa - Samus Aran from video game Metroid.
Pitan with her cat family, Tokyo, Japan - Nenekochan, an original cosplay, a doll with the appearance of a cat.
Brenda with her mother and brother, Kenya, Africa - female version of Chainsaw Man from the manga Chainsaw Man.
Alessio and his parents, Tuscany, Italy. - Seto Kaiba from the manga series YO-Gi-Oh!
Arianna and her mother, Merate, Italy - Katsuki Bakugo from the manga series My Hero Academia.
Uta and his family, Chiba, Japan - Toshikazu Hazamada a secondary character from the manga series JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 4
Chebet and her mother, Nairobi, Africa - Drolta Tzuentes from the animated series Castlevania Nocturne.
Emma with her parents, Masciago, Italy - Princess Peach from the Super Mario video games.
Marco and his parents, Grottammare, Italy - Jinx from video game League of Legends.
Ren and his father Atsushi in costume, grandfather on couch, Ibakari, Japan - Ibaliger characters who teach good manners to kids
Asgar and his mother Kenya, Africa - Scorpion character from Mortal Kombat.
Fahmy and his mother, Kenya, Africa - Kid Flash, Flash's sidekick.
Andrea and his parents, Samarate, Italy - Gojo Satoru from the Jujitsu Kaisen manga.
Vincenzo and his family, Milan, Italy - Momon from the light novel series Overlord.
Rachele and her mother, Florence, Italy - Morticia and Cousin It from Addams Family.
item.dc:creator: FAUST44

item.title: GovBrief Today #440
item.description: The Army deleted its own tribute to Sen. Tammy Duckworth today. Duckworth flew Black Hawks in Iraq until an RPG took both her legs. She came home with a Purple Heart, earned her PhD, served as Assistant Secretary of Veterans Affairs, and raised a family. Army Secretary Dan Driscoll, who couldn't answer her questions at his own confirmation hearing, shut down the whole Soldier for Life page inside 48 hours after MAGA complaints. Hours after that, Senate Republicans voted down her Iran war powers resolution. If all that wasn't bad enough, Pete Hegseth spent the same day gutting union contracts for Pentagon civilian workers inside 24 hours. But the most egregious story tonight is about Marie-Thérèse Ross. She is the 86-year-old French widow of a U.S. Army captain. ICE arrested her April 1 with her green card paperwork pending. Her family couldn't reach her for a week. The French consul has had to visit her twice. Hit the phones. Call your representatives through 5 Calls and Resistbot and tell them that if we truly honor the service of our veterans, we need to get this 86-year-old widow with health problems out of an immigration jail. We've emailed 7,000+ stories over 440 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Embedded links, data, images at the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260415-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/rubio-trade [2] https://go.govbrief.today/cuba-planning [3] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-10k-troops [4] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr15 [5] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-powell-new [6] https://go.govbrief.today/soldier-for-life [7] https://go.govbrief.today/pentagon-capacity [8] https://go.govbrief.today/boat-attack-177 [9] https://go.govbrief.today/pipe-bomb-terrorism [10] https://go.govbrief.today/france-ice [11] https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-impeachment [12] https://go.govbrief.today/war-powers-four [13] https://go.govbrief.today/collective-agreements-dod [14] https://go.govbrief.today/labor-texts [15] https://go.govbrief.today/eastman-disbarred Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1669 (Fisher-price grave goods)
item.description:
Let's get this bread
@racheKatze
When you have a lot, build a longer table, not a higher fence.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Good morning! What doin?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin

item.description: Well, at least he faced real consequences. Just kidding. https://northcountrynow.com/stories/massena-police-officer-to-receive-no-jail-time-for-purposely-damaging-vehicle-during-search,198548
item.dc:creator: karlfrack

item.title: Tax preparation here, so glad tax season is over
item.description: I specialize in accounting work for trusts, dealing with a lot of what I would call very wealthy people (taking in a million or 2 a year) in my observations, people making 200k to a million or so pay a TON in taxes as a percentage of their income. Then you have corporations and the ultra wealthy, let’s say 10million plus, that have enough assets to distribute their wealth in a way that avoids taxes and end up paying a far lower effective tax rate than normal rich people. It’s wild. Tax the (ultra) rich.
item.dc:creator: Ioftenpretendtobeapotato
